title: Linociera timorensis
taxonomy: Linociera timorensis is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Sapindaceae. It is native to the island of Timor in Indonesia and is also found in some parts of Australia. The plant belongs to the genus Linociera, which is a group of plants that are primarily found in the tropical regions of Asia and the Pacific. The classification of Linociera timorensis is further refined to the order Sapindales and the class Magnoliopsida. As a member of the Sapindaceae family, Linociera timorensis is closely related to other plants such as the lychee and the rambutan.
